---

| Feature | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Cash Back** | **2.5% on all purchases** — no categories to track! |
| **Annual Fee** | **$0.00** |
| **Minimum Credit Score** | 720 |
| **Requirement** | Active **Rho-Bank+ premium subscription** |

This is the highest flat-rate cash back you can get without paying an annual fee — perfect for everyday purchases!

---

## Other No-Annual-Fee Personal Cards

---

## Cards With Annual Fees (If That's Your Only Option)

| **Crypto-Cash Back** | 2% on eligible spend | $75 |

| **Diamond Elite Card** | Premium benefits | $495 |

---

**My top recommendation** would be the **Gold Rewards Card** — it gives you **2.5% cash back on every purchase** with **no annual fee** (just requiring a Rho-Bank+ subscription). That's the highest flat-rate cash back without an annual cost.
